component.name: QCalc
component.summary: 5 calculators, 8 languages — built for productivity and accessibility

description.p: QCalc packs 5 specialized calculators and 8 languages into one clean, keyboard-friendly app. Built with Vue 3, Quasar, and Electron, it covers everyday arithmetic, unit conversion, currency exchange, programmer math, and formula evaluation — all one tab away.

ul.li: Standard — arithmetic, percentages, trig, powers, roots, factorial
Unit Converter — 15+ categories (length, area, volume, weight, and more)
Currency Converter — real-time exchange rates with quick adjustments
Radix Converter — binary/octal/decimal/hex with bitwise operations
Formula — type math expressions directly using mathjs syntax
Calculation history with notes and CSV export/import
8 languages — Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, Hindi, German, Spanish, French
ARIA labels, screen reader announcements, keyboard focus indicators, reduced motion support
Multiple color themes, dark mode, and keyboard-first design
Settings and history export/import for consistent environments

description.p: New Formula calculator, 5 additional languages (Chinese, Hindi, German, Spanish, French), Flatpak packaging, Electron 40, and accessibility improvements.
Number format per calculator feature and various bug fixes.
